references.note: Canonical publication source maintained by Open Data Commons (Open Knowledge Foundation).
OpenStreetMap is ODbL's highest-profile adopter; the OSM wiki explains how the Collective Database and Produced Work rules apply to its map data.

approvals.note: Not OSI-approved. ODbL is a data license rather than a software license; it is not listed on OSI's approved-licenses list because its subject matter (databases and database rights) falls outside OSI's open-source software definition.
FSF does not classify data licenses on its free-software-licenses list. ODbL is not listed under either free or non-free categories.
